notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ FIPS Compliant for Rocky Linux 9.2. It addresses 22 CVEs: CVE-2022-50367, CVE-2022-50386, CVE-2023-53401, CVE-2023-53513, CVE-2025-39730, and 17 more.
notes.title: Description
